title: dendranthema coronarium
intro: Dendranthema coronarium, also known as Chrysanthemum coronarium, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family, commonly found in the Mediterranean region and the Middle East. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which help to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Dendranthema coronarium include treating fever, headaches, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from menstrual cramps and other women's health issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its health benefits.
